Interface GameView

All Known Implementing Classes:
Game
public interface GameView
Read-only view of the Game model exposed to observers and the board. Provides access to the player list, current era, and era-progression logic.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ERA
    getCurrentEra()
    Returns the era the game is currently in.
    List<Player>
    getPlayerList()
    Returns the ordered list of all players participating in the game.
    int
    getPlayerNumber()
    Returns the total number of players in this game session.
    void
    nextEra()
    Advances the game to the next era.

  • Method Details

    • getPlayerNumber

      int getPlayerNumber()
      Returns the total number of players in this game session.
      Returns:
      the player count (2–5).

    • getPlayerList

      List<Player> getPlayerList()
      Returns the ordered list of all players participating in the game.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable snapshot of the player list.

    • getCurrentEra

      ERA getCurrentEra()
      Returns the era the game is currently in.
      Returns:
      the current ERA.

    • nextEra

      void nextEra()
      Advances the game to the next era. Called when the current era's deck section is exhausted.
